Senior Backend Engineer (m/f/d) — Berlin or remote. We are looking for an engineer
with 5+ years of experience building distributed systems in Python or Go. You will design
REST APIs with FastAPI, own our PostgreSQL schemas, and run workloads on AWS (ECS, Lambda,
S3). Experience with Docker and Kubernetes is required; Terraform is a plus. You care about
observability (Grafana, Prometheus) and write clean, tested code. Strong communication
skills and fluent English required, German is a bonus.

Data Scientist — we use Python, SQL and dbt daily. You'll build machine learning
models with scikit-learn and PyTorch, deploy them via MLflow, and communicate findings to
stakeholders. Familiarity with LLMs, prompt engineering and RAG pipelines is a strong plus.
Excellent problem solving and teamwork expected.

Frontend developer needed: React.js, Next.js and TypeScript. CSS-in-JS (styled-components),
Node.js tooling, and c++ addons occasionally. Nice to have: c# or .net (c#) background,
Vue.js, testing with Jest.

Join our fast-paced team! We value hustle, passion and a can-do attitude. You will wear
many hats and drive impact across the org. Benefits include free snacks and a dog-friendly
office in Munich.
PYTHON developer. Python scripting. We love PYTHON and SQL and sql.
We enjoy long walks on the beach and quarterly offsites.
Kenntnisse in Python und SQL erforderlich, Erfahrung mit Kubernetes von Vorteil. Gehalt €70k.
